{{CargoRelic
|name=Chronicles of Time
|class_id=21447
|rank=SSS
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=The Chronicles of Time is a mysterious tome with the power to change the world, recording the flow of time and the changes in history throughout the world. The power ofThis artifact is almost limitless, capable of rewriting reality, altering the course of history, and even reshaping everyone's memories and perceptions. No matter who, regardless of their strength, the strokes of the Chronicles of Time can easily dictate their fate, serving as the weaver of the script of destiny, possessing supreme authority.
|fame=109
|art=63
|fth=49
|civ=73
|tech=68
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Snail DEF +10<br>Snail RUSH +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail DEF +20<br>Snail RUSH +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail DEF +30<br>Snail RUSH +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +50<br>Snail DEF +50<br>Snail RUSH +50
|ss5=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70<br>Snail RUSH +70
|ss6=Snail ATK +100<br>Snail DEF +100<br>Snail RUSH +100
|ss7=Snail ATK +100<br>Snail DEF +100<br>Snail RUSH +100<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Skill skill III.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill2=[[File:Skill skill III.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill3=[[File:Skill skill III.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
}}
